name: Cheese & Broccoli Potato Topper
recipeInstructions:
Prep time: 10 minutes. Cook time: 10 minutes
1. In a 1 1/2-quart saucepan, combine the soup, sour cream (or yogurt), and mustard. Add the broccoli. Heat through, stirring occasionally.
2. Serve over the potatoes. Garnish with chopped sweet red pepper if desired.
TIP: To bake potatoes: Using a fork, pierce each potato; bake at 400°F for 1 hour or microwave on HIGH for 10 1/2 to 12 1/2 minutes until fork-tender.
